creator: peter.schuller@infidyne.com
text:
Heh, interesting. Finally getting around to investigating, it seems
that the download URL is only transiently available. It was still 404
for me now, until I went through the redirect on the home page, after
which it was again downloadable.

Presumably github does on-demand cache population and the
redirected-to URL:s are not supposed to be treated as permalinks.
Indeed the HTTP status code is 302.

I haven't figured out what the intended method is of obtaining a
stable tarball URL.

-- 
/ Peter Schuller
